name: ccg
description: Codex-native CCG workflow planner, executor, Git/context, spec, team, and quality command surface. Codex creates Chinese plans, orchestrates Gemini, applies code, verifies changes, and reports results.

interface.shortDescription: Run CCG workflows with Codex as executor and Gemini as helper
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native rewrite of the CCG workflow. Codex owns planning, implementation, and verification, while Gemini can be called through bounded standard prompt templates with a local browser preview for read-only planning analysis, frontend/UI help, backend architecture alternatives, debugging, optimization, tests, drafts, edge-case analysis, or review. Includes cache diagnostics, hardened snapshots, high-frequency CCG commands, Git/context helpers, spec workflows, team workflows, and local quality/security gates. New plan artifacts are Chinese by default and live under .codex/ccg/plans/.
